94:
WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT client_id, birth_date, district_id
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
),
oldest_female_clients AS (
    SELECT client_id, birth_date, district_id
    FROM female_clients
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM female_clients)
),
district_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT district_id, AVG(A11) AS avg_salary
    FROM district
    GROUP BY district_id
),
oldest_female_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT dfc.client_id, das.avg_salary
    FROM oldest_female_clients dfc
    JOIN district_avg_salary das ON dfc.district_id = das.district_id
),
salary_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        MIN(avg_salary) AS lowest_avg_salary,
        MAX(avg_salary) AS highest_avg_salary
    FROM oldest_female_avg_salary
)
SELECT 
    ofas.client_id,
    ofas.avg_salary,
    ss.highest_avg_salary - ss.lowest_avg_salary AS salary_gap
FROM oldest_female_avg_salary ofas
CROSS JOIN salary_stats ss;

1481:
WITH segment_min_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        MIN(ym.Consumption) AS MinConsumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth ym
    JOIN 
        customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment
),
segment_annual_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ym.CustomerID) AS NumCustomers
    FROM 
        yearmonth ym
    JOIN 
        customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND ym.Consumption = (
            SELECT MinConsumption
            FROM segment_min_consumption smc
            WHERE smc.Segment = c.Segment
        )
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment
),
segment_annual_average AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        CAST(TotalConsumption AS REAL) / NumCustomers AS AnnualAverage
    FROM 
        segment_annual_consumption
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM segment_annual_average WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM segment_annual_average WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_LAM_Difference,
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM segment_annual_average WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM segment_annual_average WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_KAM_Difference,
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM segment_annual_average WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - 
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM segment_annual_average WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_SME_Difference
1482:
SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    MAX((CAST(y2013.Consumption - y2012.Consumption AS REAL) / y2012.Consumption) * 100) AS MaxPercentageIncrease,
    MIN((CAST(y2013.Consumption - y2012.Consumption AS REAL) / y2012.Consumption) * 100) AS MinPercentageIncrease
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y2012 ON c.CustomerID = y2012.CustomerID AND SUBSTR(y2012.Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
JOIN 
    yearmonth y2013 ON c.CustomerID = y2013.CustomerID AND SUBSTR(y2013.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
WHERE 
    c.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment;
